Maybe even enables b+1 / b+2 being a more interesting mode

[2023-02-18 23:51] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): New mode:

Both players play two games at the same time, using the same random set -- each player is p1 in one game and p2 in the other.

The turns are played simultaneously. I.e. on turn 1, both players play their p1 turn, on turn 1' they both play their p2 turn, and so on. However, they don't get to see their opponent's moves until after submitting their own.

All existing mechanics apply to both games independently, and even if one game ends, the other still continues as normal.

The overall match outcome is decided by the combining the two games' outcomes. If both players win 1 out of the 2 games then the match ends in a draw.

More specifically: winning a game gives +1 point, and drawing or losing a game gives +0 point. Therefore the possible combinations of outcomes can yield the following from the perspective of one of the players:
* Win A / Win A: +2/+0  --> A wins by 2
* Win A / Win B: +1/+1  --> A & B draw
* Win A / Draw: +1/+0 --> A wins by 1
* Draw / Draw: +0/+0 --> A & B draw
[2023-02-18 23:55] amalloy: you're inventing duplicate bridge

[2023-03-06 18:53] steel0229e (Steel): hi guys! I redeemer my password and loggen into discord after 4 years just for this tournament announcement
[2023-03-06 18:53] steel0229e (Steel): I'd like to help with organising and/or casting
[2023-03-06 18:53] steel0229e (Steel): I have some recommendations for the format:
[2023-03-06 18:53] steel0229e (Steel): I have been thinking about this for long, even wrote in chat
[2023-03-06 18:54] steel0229e (Steel): but I didn't take the initiative
[2023-03-06 18:54] awaclus: why is the most important skill in the game the ability to not get distracted while your opponent is taking forever to think
[2023-03-06 18:55] steel0229e (Steel): So about format. My recommendation:
[2023-03-06 18:55] steel0229e (Steel): best of 5, double elimination
[2023-03-06 18:55] steel0229e (Steel): in the lower bracket it should be best of 3 or best of 1
[2023-03-06 18:55] steel0229e (Steel): mulligans should be an option, 1 mulligan/game
[2023-03-06 18:56] awaclus: can I mulligan the time control into 20s
[2023-03-06 18:56] steel0229e (Steel): to prevent games where players feel it is very advantaged to one side
[2023-03-06 18:57] steel0229e (Steel): in 5 games that is very liberal
[2023-03-06 18:58] steel0229e (Steel): Anyway here goes my next recommendation: a separate bracket for players whose elo is below 1900. So we encourage new players as well as less experienced players
[2023-03-06 18:58] siepu: the only players below 1900
[2023-03-06 18:58] siepu: are the 2100 players with decay
[2023-03-06 18:58] steel0229e (Steel): The inspiration for this is my first ever Prismata tournament organised by Crash, it was called chrono cup. It had a noob bracket and it was so much fun to play
[2023-03-06 18:58] steel0229e (Steel): there are people like Addition who play regularly
[2023-03-06 19:00] steel0229e (Steel): maybe the winner of the "noob bracket" gets seeded into the main tournament
[2023-03-06 19:01] steel0229e (Steel): i dont think mentioniong names is helpful, just wanted to point out that not everyone is 2100 rated
[2023-03-06 19:01] steel0229e (Steel): maybe an announcement like this would draw back people who quitted
[2023-03-06 19:02] steel0229e (Steel): since bo5 takes forever I think 45s is fair
[2023-03-06 19:03] steel0229e (Steel): especially with double elim
[2023-03-06 19:03] steel0229e (Steel): maybe the beginner bracket could have 60s
[2023-03-06 19:04] steel0229e (Steel): What are your thoughts?
[2023-03-06 19:06] steel0229e (Steel): any objections to double elim or the beginner bracket?
[2023-03-06 19:07] steel0229e (Steel): yeah it would make only sense if it had at least 10 people in it
[2023-03-06 19:07] steel0229e (Steel): if we create a challongeone page and announce it in advance I think many people will sign up
[2023-03-06 19:07] steel0229e (Steel): i just phrased that way for alliteration
[2023-03-06 19:08] steel0229e (Steel): i live in the past man 😄
[2023-03-06 19:08] steel0229e (Steel): nowadays everything is a league
[2023-03-06 19:08] steel0229e (Steel): even a 10 player tournament

[2023-03-08 11:11] steel0229e (Steel): When I started Prismata there was Chrono Cup, an entire tournament dedicated to new players. It was very motivating for me who came from a competetive background and it wasn't derogatory at all. I actually ended up winning it (it was a tie with zezetel) and it got both of us hooked. Of all the other participants, noone else plays the game any more, just the 2 of us. And the organisers could fill a whole bracket (around 14-20 people).

If the then reigning top players would have been paired with us, we'd have stood no chance. I think this hasn't changed, a 200 elo gap is so big in this game that in a best of 5 the underdog is expected to lose all the time. Which is why it makes sense to cut the ladder in half and create a separate event so everyone can have an enjoyable game, even the less competetive type of players.
